get.description: Get a persisted run-detail snapshot suitable for frontend hydration.
Return the append-only mutation log for a run, ordered by sequence.

schema.title: Response Get Mutations Runs  Run Id  Mutations Get

get.description: Stream the blob bytes for a RunResource.
Return score-over-step data for checkpoint evaluations.

schema.title: Response Get Training Curves Runs Training Curves Get

get.description: List training sessions, optionally filtered by definition.

schema.title: Response Get Training Sessions Runs Training Sessions Get

get.description: Get per-step training metrics for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Training Metrics Runs Training Sessions  Session Id  Metrics Get

post.description: Start a batch of episodes. Returns immediately with batch_id.

get.description: Poll batch status. Returns trajectories when complete.

post.description:
Restart vLLM with a new checkpoint (full-weight RFT).

Blocks until the new vLLM process is healthy.

get.description: Resolve a cohort name to its UUID for dashboard navigation.

List all runs attached to a cohort by name.

``cohort_key`` matches ``ExperimentCohort.name`` exactly.  Returns
empty list when the cohort does not exist (rather than 404) so
Playwright / pytest can poll cheaply while a cohort is being
submitted.

schema.title: Response Read Cohort Runs Api   Danger   Test Harness Read Cohort  Cohort Key  Runs Get
Response Seed Run Api   Danger   Test Harness Write Run Seed Post

post.description:
Build + persist + dispatch N runs under one cohort.

Per-slot flow persists the object-bound smoke ``Benchmark`` into the
immutable ``ExperimentDefinition`` tables. Cohort/display metadata is
written onto the definition metadata before launch. Slots submit
sequentially — typical N ≤ 3, so the parallel-gather savings are negligible.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as assistant text.

content.title: Content
content.description: Assistant response text emitted by the worker.

CohortDetailDto.title: CohortDetailDto
CohortDetailDto.description: Full payload for a single cohort detail page.

CohortExperimentRowDto.title: CohortExperimentRowDto
CohortExperimentRowDto.description: One experiment inside a cohort detail view.

CohortStatusCountsDto.title: CohortStatusCountsDto
CohortStatusCountsDto.description: Aggregate run counts by lifecycle status.

CohortSummaryDto.title: CohortSummaryDto
CohortSummaryDto.description: Summary row for cohort list and live updates.

token_ids.title: Token Ids
token_ids.description: Token IDs associated with this context part when provided by the backend.

logprobs.title: Logprobs
logprobs.description: Per-token log probabilities associated with this context part.

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description: Monotonic sequence number within the execution stream.

worker_binding_key.title: Worker Binding Key
worker_binding_key.description: Worker binding that emitted this context part.

turn_id.title: Turn Id
turn_id.description: Stable generation turn identifier shared by related streamed parts.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: Timestamp when generation for this part started.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: Timestamp when generation for this part completed.

policy_version.title: Policy Version
policy_version.description: Optional worker or policy version that produced the part.

ContextPartChunkLog.title: ContextPartChunkLog
ContextPartChunkLog.description: Core-enriched context stream item suitable for API/dashboard projection.

EpisodeFailure.title: EpisodeFailure
EpisodeFailure.description: An episode that didn't complete successfully.

id.title: Id
id.description: Identifier of the mutation row itself, not a graph target id.

target_id.title: Target Id
target_id.description: Polymorphic mutation target identifier. Interpreted as a NodeId, EdgeId, or annotation id based on target_type and mutation_type.

GraphMutationRecordDto.title: GraphMutationRecordDto
GraphMutationRecordDto.description: Append-only graph mutation record with a typed mutation payload.

NodeRemovedMutation.title: NodeRemovedMutation
NodeRemovedMutation.description: node.removed — node snapshot at removal time.

PollResponse.title: PollResponse
PollResponse.description: Ergon → Trainer: current batch status + trajectories if complete.

RunTaskDto.title: RunTaskDto
RunTaskDto.description:
REST projection of RunGraphNode for run detail pages.

This is not the canonical graph schema; graph semantics live in
application/graph/models.py and persistence/graph/status_conventions.py.

SubmitRequest.title: SubmitRequest
SubmitRequest.description: Trainer → Ergon: start a batch of episodes.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as a system prompt.

content.title: Content
content.description: System instructions supplied to the worker.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as private thinking.

content.title: Content
content.description: Reasoning or thinking text emitted by the model.

logprob.title: Logprob
logprob.description: Natural-log probability assigned to the token.

top_logprobs.title: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: Optional model-provider alternatives and probabilities for this position.

TokenLogprob.title: TokenLogprob
TokenLogprob.description: Per-token log probability from the serving backend.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as a tool call.

tool_name.title: Tool Name
tool_name.description: Name of the tool requested by the worker.

tool_call_id.title: Tool Call Id
tool_call_id.description: Provider-stable identifier for this tool call.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as a tool result.

tool_call_id.title: Tool Call Id
tool_call_id.description: Identifier of the tool call this result answers.

tool_name.title: Tool Name
tool_name.description: Name of the tool that produced this result.

is_error.title: Is Error
is_error.description: Whether the tool result represents an error response.

Trajectory.title: Trajectory
Trajectory.description:
One agent's extracted trajectory from a completed episode.

Maps 1:1 to AgentTrajectory from extraction.py, plus metadata.

UpdateCohortRequest.title: UpdateCohortRequest
UpdateCohortRequest.description: Mutable cohort fields exposed through the operator API.

part_kind.title: Part Kind
part_kind.description: Discriminator identifying this context part as a user message.

content.title: Content
content.description: User or upstream task message content.

WeightSyncRequest.title: WeightSyncRequest
WeightSyncRequest.description:
Trainer → Ergon: restart vLLM with updated checkpoint.

For full-weight RFT: Ergon kills the vLLM process and restarts it
with --model pointing to checkpoint_path. Blocks until healthy.
